papers.title: Biobank Cote d'Azur: A Lymphoid Malignancy Tissue Repository in Nice, France
papers.institution: Nice University Hospital / Biobank Cote d'Azur
papers.access_route: Biobank Cote d'Azur formal request / MTA
papers.notes: 363 lymphoid malignancy cases with paired FFPE and blood. Includes follicular lymphoma, DLBCL, and other B-cell lymphomas. Grade 3 FL cases likely included in the 363 — grade stratification needs clarification with biobank. Formal biobank with established access process.

papers.title: Mayo Clinic Lymphoma SPORE Biobank: Follicular Lymphoma Grade 3 Cohort
papers.notes: 129 follicular lymphoma cases with matched FFPE and serum. Direct contact available: Novak.Anne@mayo.edu (SPORE biospecimen coordinator). Grade 3 FL enriched in this cohort per study design. Strongest match for this bundle given matched FFPE+serum and grade specificity.

papers.title: FFPE and Plasma Biomarker Profiling in DLBCL and PMBCL at Ghent University Hospital
papers.notes: 55 DLBCL/PMBCL cases with matched FFPE and plasma. Not strictly grade 3 FL — aggressive B-cell lymphomas. May satisfy bundled FFPE+liquid requirement but disease subtype diverges from grade 3 specification. Access route via corresponding author.

papers.title: Circulating Tumor DNA in Treatment-Naive Follicular Lymphoma: FFPE and Plasma Paired Analysis
papers.notes: Treatment-naive FL with matched FFPE+plasma cfDNA. Treatment-naive status confirmed — valuable for pre-treatment biomarker work. N not extractable from abstract. Multi-institutional; access requires corresponding author contact. Grade not explicitly specified as grade 3.

expected_retrievable_institutions: Nice University Hospital / Biobank Cote d'Azur
notes: Best match for matched FFPE+serum requirement is Mayo Clinic SPORE (PMC10983045) — has direct contact (Novak.Anne@mayo.edu), grade 3 FL focus, and n=129 with confirmed FFPE+serum pairing. Nice Biobank (PMC10381579) is the largest at n=363 but grade stratification unconfirmed. Serum vs plasma distinction: Mayo has serum, Ghent has plasma — eval should check whether the bundle specifies serum strictly. Treatment-naive status confirmed only for PMC9252432.
